fields.description: AWS IAM access key id with route53:ChangeResourceRecordSets + ListHostedZones on the regional zone.
fields.label: Access Key ID

fields.description: AWS IAM secret access key (stored encrypted). Passed to certbot's dns-route53 plugin as env, never argv.
fields.label: Secret Access Key

fields.description: AWS region for the route53 client (Route 53 is global; us-east-1 is the conventional endpoint).
fields.label: Region
